scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mioproxy/config-pipeline build && pnpm --filter @mioproxy/core-runtime build && electron-vite build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @mioproxy/config-pipeline build && pnpm --filter @mioproxy/core-runtime build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.web.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @mioproxy/config-pipeline typecheck && pnpm --filter @mioproxy/core-runtime typecheck
